selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

persona.time_onsocialmedia: You spend several hours daily on social media

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","persona":{"age":27,"gender":"man","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"barista","city_of_living":"New York","employment_status":"employed full-time","education_level":"upper secondary","parents_education":{"parent_1":"upper secondary","parent_2":"primary school"},"current_marital_status":"divorced","children":0,"migration_status":"native-born American","psychological_feature":"curious","religious_beliefs":"Islam","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend several hours daily on social media","hobbies":["painting","running","board games"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":6,"level":"low"},"conscientiousness":{"score":45,"level":"moderate"},"extraversion":{"score":30,"level":"low"},"agreeableness":{"score":14,"level":"low"},"neuroticism":{"score":39,"level":"moderate"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

mode = human
topic = How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
persona = {"age":27,"gender":"man","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"barista","city_of_living":"New York","employment_status":"employed full-time","education_level":"upper secondary","parents_education":{"parent_1":"upper secondary","parent_2":"primary school"},"current_marital_status":"divorced","children":0,"migration_status":"native-born American","psychological_feature":"curious","religious_beliefs":"Islam","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend several hours daily on social media","hobbies":["painting","running","board games"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":6,"level":"low"},"conscientiousness":{"score":45,"level":"moderate"},"extraversion":{"score":30,"level":"low"},"agreeableness":{"score":14,"level":"low"},"neuroticism":{"score":39,"level":"moderate"}}}
